news.title: Energy Shock Clouds $800 Billion of Asian Data Center Financing
news.description: The energy shock sparked by the Iran war is increasingly coming up in conversations about data center deals for Asian bankers, who have helped finance billions of dollars of artificial intelligence infrastructure across the region.

news.title: Trump suggests Iran war may end in 'two to three weeks'

stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is an American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, development, production, transportation, and marketing of hydrocarbon resources. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Nexen Inc. (NEE) is a Canadian company specializing in natural gas and oil extraction operations. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company based in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
